text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: It's my victory!

Her loud declaration echoes across the turf in a foreign land. 
——I could feel goosebumps as her cry reverberated through my body.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
There's an Uma Musume that I want to win against. She's based 
overseas, so I'd like to visit her on her home turf, but——

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
According to the academy rules, students will not 
receive permission if they travel alone. My family and 
instructors will be unavailable……So I thought I'd ask you.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
I know that I'm asking for a lot, since the 
only time we talked was that one time back then.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
But, please! I really want to win 
against that girl, no matter what!

I was already well aware of that. 
But I didn't think she'd go so far as to travel overseas for it……

With that kind of determination, just how much 
could she achieve? As I was giving that some 
thought, I realized……I already had my answer.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
……! Thank you very much! 
Then……once all the particulars are figured out, I'll let you know.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Eh……do you mean it? 
Thank you very much, it would be really helpful!

There were probably all kinds of things I could help 
with, like recording times and such. And so we began 
working together towards her overseas revenge match!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Haa, haa, haa…… Looks like we've come pretty far. 
How's the bike's fuel, still fine?

Almond Eye had just run, nonstop, over rough 
terrain through forests, hills, and mountain paths.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
It's better to push myself, so I can build up endurance. 
That time, on the final straight, they got away from me, after all.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
The turf over there is heavier. 
So I need to be able to keep my rhythm and work on my cardio.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: ……Oh, looks like it's starting to rain.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: ——It's cold, and feels really good.
choice_data_list: Perfect, let's take a quick break then

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
No, I don't want to waste any time! ……Ah, Trainer-san, 
you can go ahead and head back! Good work out there!

She dashed away without hesitation, 
accelerating off in to the pouring rain——

I started looking over the racing manuals and her 
recorded data. With her permission, I recorded her 
form on video and was reviewing it now, frame by frame.

Her breathing, range of motion, arm swinging. If she could adjust 
her form to more ideally fit her, it would surely make her stronger.
Before I realized it, the sun was already rising——

Probably not for another 12 hours or so. 
I rubbed my eyes and went back to my desk to make some revisions.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: This is——
choice_data_list: This is the form that works best for you
This is the form that works best for you

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much! I'm going to try it out immediately, okay? 
And this is……weight training meant to work with this form.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
……? 
……Um. This file says 『ver.1』 on it though——

I took a quick look, and sure enough, it did. 
I accidentally showed her my first draft.
choice_data_list: Sorry, this is the one it should be
Sorry, this is the one it should be

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
『ver.9』——Ohh! Here and here……and here. 
The numbers are different……Ohhhh……

——I really hope it's helpful for her. 
At any rate, we continued to train tirelessly after that!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
——!! 
Not yet not yet, not yet not yet, not yet noooot yeeeet!!!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: Haa! Haa! Haa! Haa! ……Haa! Phew!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: I'm going to win! I will! For sure, for sure, for sure——For sure!!!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: Aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaah!!!!!
And so——the fateful day of her revenge match arrived.

text_block_list.name: Overseas Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Welcome to my turf! You ready to run?

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Of course! 
My preparations are perfect, perfect——for winning against you!

……『All the way from Japan?』『For a pre-debut girl, that's crazy』 
Those were the whispered words of the other gathered Uma Musume——
Finally, her third revenge match had started!

She had an effortless start, and took position at the front. 
The race progressed quickly——and then at the fourth corner……!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
The battle starts……! Right here——!! 
……Taaaaaaa!!

text_block_list.name: Overseas Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Looks like… I'm gonna win again!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Win, win, win……I will win——!! 
Aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaahh————!!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: It's my victory!
The turf was dead silent.

——I wanted to run up and say 『Congratulations!』 to her. 
But, even though I wanted to, my legs wouldn't move for some reason.
choice_data_list: (I……had been with her all these days)
(I……had been with her all these days)

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Not yet not yet, not yet not yet……Not yet not yet!!! 
Not yet, right heeeeerreーーーーーー!!
Those days spent toiling away had paid off.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
……You ended up accompanying me quite far, didn't you? 
But, thanks to that, I was able to win! Really, thank you very much.
choice_data_list: How……were you able to keep going?
How……were you able to keep going?

text_block_list.text:
Why, just to beat someone she lost to once, she underwent strenuous 
training and even traveled overseas——Why was she able to go so far?

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: ……"Why" you ask?

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: It's because I want to win

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: Because winning is something that makes me happy! Incredibly so!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
It's always been like that for me. I love winning 
——Against a bunch of the junior club girls, 
I remember challenging them so, so many times.

text_block_list.name: Young Ai
text_block_list.text:
……Ugh, ghh! 
Again! Tomorrow, let's race again!

text_block_list.name: Young Ai
text_block_list.text: Next time, I'll win for sure……!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Even if there was a difference in height. Even against 
older girls. Even losing against my instructors would be 
frustrating. And because of that, I'd train and train so much——

text_block_list.name: Young Ai
text_block_list.text:
Haa! haa! My head……is spinning……! 
……But not yet, not yet not yet! I can't win like this! Taaa!!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: ——And so, I ended up winning against all of them.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Working so hard and winning made me so happy. And that feeling 
of wanting to win just kept growing and growing and growing!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: ——I love winning. More than anyone else in the world!
——I felt a sudden chill.

I thought I understood her——but it had only been surface level. 
She was right there, yet still felt so far away. But for some reason——

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
However——When an Uma Musume that can achieve 
that appears, I'm sure all eyes will be on her.
Symboli Rudolf's words from that day came to mind.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: …………Haa. Phew……

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
……I'm sorry, I've just been feeling a little 
dizzy from earlier. Let me……Just for a little——
